protocol: N=2 medians, engines interleaved per model in the same hour-regime, idle-gated cold starts, no flags (tuned paths are defaults); rebaseline2 campaign + 35B spec refresh 2026-07-10 (router GEMV + CSR gate_up dedup; H-runs, N=2, 1590MHz/58-65C, idle GPU, llama = marked 07-09 floor), FA-v4 refresh 2026-07-10 (J-runs N=2; 35B p1 -0.5% = the v4 shallow-ctx cost, honest); 27B p1/p2 re-paired 2026-07-10 (I-runs: same-session interleaved N=2, idle GPU; p3 sampled pair unchanged), raw logs in research/tune-data/rebaseline-logs/

plain_decode.context: tg128 at 512-token context, sustained-load regime (both engines same session)

speculative.context: MTP head, both engines at their measured best config. Columns: short-code / medium-code (greedy temp-0, field-standard bounded protocol) / long-agentic SAMPLED (temp 0.7 seed 42, chat-templated, well-formed prompt — rejection-sampling spec decode, distribution-exact; llama at matched temperature).
